ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates hub notes for each folder (hidden by default). These act as folder nodes in graph view. Shared named folders are supported by a # sequence in filename, in order of note creation time.
ast.target: 为每个文件夹创建枢纽笔记（默认隐藏）。这些在图视图中充当文件夹节点。共享名称文件夹通过文件名中的 # 序列支持，按笔记创建时间排序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds hub links at the top of all notes that are inside folders, linking all notes to their appropriate hub note. You can hide the links from your notes with the options below.
ast.target: 在所有位于文件夹内的笔记顶部添加枢纽链接，将所有笔记链接到其相应的枢纽笔记。您可以使用下面的选项隐藏笔记中的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove all hub notes (foldersuffix(#) notes). This will only take effect on notes that match their folder name, plus suffix (and number for shared-name folders).
ast.target: 移除所有枢纽笔记（文件夹后缀(#) 笔记）。这仅适用于与其文件夹名称匹配的笔记，加上后缀（对于共享名称文件夹还有数字）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove all hub links (foldersuffix(#) links inside notes). This will only take effect on links in your notes that match the hub note name, plus suffix (and number for shared-name folders).
ast.target: 移除所有枢纽链接（笔记内的文件夹后缀(#) 链接）。这仅适用于笔记中与枢纽笔记名称匹配的链接，加上后缀（对于共享名称文件夹还有数字）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep all hub notes and hub links in notes up to date through location changes, renames, and such. If disabled, updates will only occur when manually using the build/refresh buttons above.
ast.target: 通过位置更改、重命名等操作，保持所有枢纽笔记和笔记中的枢纽链接处于最新状态。如果禁用，更新将仅在手动使用上面的构建/刷新按钮时发生。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom suffix for hub note names and hub links ( _ , -- , ( , ; ). Use the build/refresh buttons to see changes.
ast.target: 枢纽笔记名称和枢纽链接的自定义后缀（ _ , -- , ( , ; ）。使用构建/刷新按钮查看更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, hub notes will be hidden in the file explorer sidebar, but still appear in graph view, and if you select their links in notes.
ast.target: 启用后，枢纽笔记将在文件资源管理器侧边栏中隐藏，但仍会出现在图视图中，以及如果您在笔记中选择其链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the hub links inside notes will be hidden.
ast.target: 启用后，笔记中的枢纽链接将被隐藏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When text is hidden on the first lines of notes, it blinks on opening. This fixes that (requires two of the top lines). Use the build/refresh buttons to see changes.
ast.target: 当笔记的前几行文本被隐藏时，打开时会闪烁。这可以修复该问题（需要顶部两行）。使用构建/刷新按钮查看更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter folder names to ignore anywhere (comma-separated if multiple). Use the removal buttons, then build/refresh to see changes.
ast.target: 输入要忽略的文件夹名称（多个用逗号分隔）。使用移除按钮，然后构建/刷新以查看更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ignore any folder whose name starts with a dot. (comma-separated if multiple). Use the removal buttons, then build/refresh to see changes.
ast.target: 忽略任何名称以点开头的文件夹。（多个用逗号分隔）。使用移除按钮，然后构建/刷新以查看更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When using Ctrl + A to select all in notes, exclude selecting hub links foldersuffix(#) links inside notes. This prevents you from accidentally interacting with them.
ast.target: 在笔记中使用 Ctrl + A 全选时，排除选择枢纽链接文件夹后缀(#) 链接。这可以防止您意外与它们交互。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, a `---` line will be inserted below hub links in notes. Use the build/refresh buttons to see changes.
ast.target: 启用后，将在笔记中的枢纽链接下方插入一条 `---` 线。使用构建/刷新按钮查看更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom hex color code for folder directory cards displayed in hub notes.
ast.target: 用于在枢纽笔记中显示的文件夹目录卡片的自定义十六进制颜色代码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset all options to their default values.
ast.target: 将所有选项重置为其默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Print debug logs to the developer console.
ast.target: 将调试日志打印到开发者控制台。

ast.name: text
ast.target: Graphforge

ast.name: text
ast.source: Automatically creates and maintains a graph view of your notes, if they're organized into folders. Folders act as the root node in graph view. Provides a quick access hub note display for each folder.
ast.target: 如果您的笔记组织在文件夹中，它会自动创建和维护笔记的图形视图。文件夹充当图形视图中的根节点。为每个文件夹提供快速访问的中心笔记显示。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 工作原理

ast.name: text
ast.source: Creates a foldersuffix(#) note for each folder (hidden by default). These act as folder nodes in graph view that all notes inside their folders attach to. Links to each hub note get added at the top of all notes. Options to customize the workflow to your liking.
ast.target: 为每个文件夹创建一个文件夹后缀(#)笔记（默认隐藏）。这些在图形视图中充当文件夹节点，其文件夹内的所有笔记都会附加到这些节点上。每个中心笔记的链接会添加到所有笔记的顶部。提供选项以根据您的喜好自定义工作流程。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 觉得这个有用吗？

ast.target: text
